steps.title: Find the common factor
steps.content: The terms $8x^5$, $-5x^4$, and $11x^3$ have no common numerical factor greater than $1$. The smallest power of $x$ in all three terms is $x^3$.

steps.title: Match the factored form
steps.content: The factored expression keeps all three terms from the original polynomial. The answer is B.
